transcription.response: The power of a god cannot be overcome! Zanzer, this is the providence of the world. Even gods are merely beings restricted to limited power, determined by promise that power... ...although great is not unlimited. The voice! Albus? How dare you disobey me?! I am Manada… …I was here at beginning and will proclaim end… But that's impossible... Shulk it time for you choose…. Does this world belong to Zanzer or does it belong to you? That something I decided long ago! AAAAAAAAHHHHHH!!! We use our powers as a feld god and then these are destiny! AAAAAAAAAAHHHHH!!! It's fate, the memory of a gods existence born from the chaos of creation. It is.

segments.text: The power of a god cannot be overcome!
Zanzer, this is the providence of the world.
Even gods are merely beings restricted to limited power, determined by promise that power...
The voice! Albus? How dare you disobey me?!
…I was here at beginning and will proclaim end…
Shulk it time for you choose….
Does this world belong to Zanzer or does it belong to you? That something I decided long ago! AAAAAAAAHHHHHH!!!
We use our powers as a feld god and then these are destiny! AAAAAAAAAAHHHHH!!!
It's fate, the memory of a gods existence born from the chaos of creation. It is.
